no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: This bead requests a new adversarial pre-close review coordinator, new reviewer correlation fields, repair-cycle behavior, terminal operator-blocking classifications, and eight dedicated tests spanning execute-loop and reviewer code. The worktree note says this execution bead is already at decomposition depth 2, so I cannot split it further here. The contract is too large for a safe single-pass implementation in this attempt, and I am not going to half-implement the review gate.
